use_cases: Displaying employee records with sortable, resizable columns for HR management dashboards
Building admin interfaces that require customizable column widths for data tables
Creating employee directories with status indicators for workforce tracking
Implementing data grids with export capabilities for business reporting tools
Developing HR systems with theme-aware table components supporting dark and light modes
ai_summary: A professional resizable data table component for displaying employee records with customizable column widths, status indicators, and theme support. Features drag-to-resize columns using react-resizable, smooth animations via framer-motion, and dark/light mode compatibility. Ideal for building HR management dashboards, admin interfaces, and workforce tracking systems in SaaS applications.
